description: [schema] All inventory migrations apply up() and roll back down() cleanly on the migrated schema (round-trip), tables/indexes/constraints present then gone
[schema] Constraints enforced at DB: duplicate serial within (tenant,service_id) rejected; duplicate MAC across DIFFERENT products in same tenant rejected (tenant-wide MAC uniqueness)
[schema] Seed creates exactly one default stock_location per tenant; a second is_default insert is rejected
[ledger] Receipt increments on_hand and writes an immutable movement; replaying stock_movements via the reconciliation utility reproduces stock_levels exactly
[ledger] Moving-average cost is correct across two receipts at different unit costs
[ledger] Adjust requires a reason (missing reason rejected); a negative adjust soft-warns but still applies and reconciles
[ledger] Serialized on_hand counts only in_stock units — units in in_transit/on_loan/returned/in_rma/delivered/retired are excluded from on-hand and available
[ledger] No update/delete path exists for stock_movements; reconciliation after a sequence of mixed movements matches the running cache
[alloc] Soft allocation on SO confirm reduces available but not on_hand; cancelling the SO releases reserved/held and returns units to in_stock
[alloc] Hard-hold: a unit/qty hard-held by SO-A cannot be poached by a material consume or SO-B fulfill (guard fires); soft allocation does not block
[consume] Fulfilling a serialized SO line sets the picked unit→delivered, decrements on_hand, and captures COGS = unit_cost on the movement
[consume] Non-serialized consume captures COGS = average_cost and releases the matching reservation
[consume] Consuming more than available soft-warns but does NOT block; the movement is still written and on_hand goes negative as surfaced
[materials] Adding a ticket material for a track_stock product decrements stock once; deleting the (unbilled) material reverses it; a retried add does not double-decrement (idempotent)
[assets] Serialized delivery with creates_asset_on_delivery=true creates an asset carrying serial/MAC/warranty with bidirectional link; with false, no asset is created
[assets] Delivery asset creation goes through the assets ABAC createAsset path (permission enforced), not a raw insert
[procure] Receiving against a PO line advances quantity_received and moves PO status open→partially_received→received
[procure] Over-receipt is allowed with a warning; PO number is unique per tenant
[procure] Vendor backfill migration maps distinct freeform service_catalog.vendor strings to vendors rows and sets preferred_vendor_id
[kit] Adding a kit to an SO explodes into a parent line + component lines (parent_so_line_id) with correct per-component quantities
[kit] Fulfilling an exploded kit decrements each STOCKED component; a non-stocked component (license) rides through without a stock decrement
[kit] Editing the kit parent line qty scales component quantities; a kit-containing-a-kit definition is rejected (single-level guard)
[transfer] Dispatch decrements source on_hand and sets units→in_transit; destination available is unchanged until receive
[transfer] Receive increments destination on_hand and sets units→in_stock at destination; cancel-before-receive returns stock to source
[loaner] Loan out sets unit→on_loan (excluded from on_hand, no COGS, no invoice); loan return restores it to in_stock
[restock] Restock return puts a unit/qty back to SELLABLE on_hand (distinct from the defective/RMA path); optional restocking fee recorded
[rma] Standard RMA: delivered→returned (NOT sellable, on_hand unchanged)→sent_to_vendor→replacement sets replacement_unit_id→replaced→closed
[rma] Standard RMA resolutions: repair (in_rma→in_stock), credit (→retired,credited), scrap (retired,closed) reach correct terminal states
[rma-advance] Advance RMA: replacement received→in_stock→deployed relinks the SAME asset, updates its serial/MAC, and clears the old unit's asset_id
[rma-advance] Advance RMA: dead_unit_owed sets dead_unit_due_date; returning the dead unit closes the case; missing the deadline transitions to charged→closed
[rma-advance] Dead-units-owed aging report lists owed units sorted by days remaining
[dropship] Drop-ship SO line creates an is_drop_ship PO to the client; combined receipt+delivery creates a delivered unit + asset + invoice with NO on_hand change at any location
[dropship] Drop-ship serialized captures serial/MAC/warranty at confirm and links the asset
[invoice] On-fulfillment invoicing emits a charge into the existing invoice engine; partial fulfillment yields a partial invoice with counters advancing independently
[invoice] Manual 'Generate invoice' plus on-fulfillment cannot double-bill the same quantity (shared quantity_invoiced guard; invoice_item↔so_line link)
[invoice] quantity_invoiced can never exceed quantity_ordered across mixed manual+on-fulfillment triggers
[perm] Location scoping: a tech can adjust own van/home location but is blocked adjusting another metro's stock; a manager/admin is allowed
[perm] Inventory actions enforce their resource permissions; the client portal has no access to any inventory surface
[perm] A stock side-effect triggered from a billing flow succeeds under billing:create without a separate inventory grant (no double-gate)
[search] Units are findable by both serial AND MAC; advisory lookup by a serial/MAC list returns matching in-stock AND deployed units
[reorder] Low-stock fires when available ≤ per-location reorder override; the alert is routed only to that location's manager_user_id
[reorder] Create-PO-from-low-stock produces draft POs grouped by preferred_vendor with suggested quantities
[report] Inventory value = Σ(on_hand × cost) reconciles after a receipt+consume sequence; margin = sell − COGS computes correctly
[guard] Product delete is blocked when stock units/levels/movements exist for that product
[contract] Running a recurring contract billing cycle for a stocked product creates NO stock movements (stock is event-driven only)
